idea-plugin.name: Nexus
idea-plugin.description:
Nexus framework support for JetBrains IDEs.
Attaches the nexus-lsp language server to Go files and nexus.toml, providing live diagnostics, an outline (document symbols), hover docs, completion, and semantic highlighting for nexus's //@ decorator handlers and the nexus.toml schema. The server binary auto-downloads on first use, so there's nothing to install.
Requires the LSP4IJ plugin.

server.name: Nexus LSP
server.description: nexus-lsp — //@ decorator handlers and nexus.toml schema support.
